name: Chicken Cacciatore W/Linguini
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add chicken pieces and cook until browned on all sides.
2. Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside. Reduce heat to low.
3. In the same skillet, sauté green onions and garlic for 2-3 minutes until fragrant.
4. Mix together tomato paste, white wine/cooking wine, pepper, chicken stock, bay leaf, and marjoram in a bowl.
5. Add the browned chicken back into the skillet with the sauce mixture.
6. Bring to a simmer, cover, and cook for 1 hour.
7. Serve hot with cooked linguini, rice, potatoes, or other pasta of choice.
